regler_sql: SELECT navn, ticker, 1 AS andel,mcap FROM aksjekurs WHERE dato = (SELECT MAX(dato) FROM aksjekurs) ORDER BY mcap DESC

SELECT a.navn, a.ticker, 1 AS andel,k.mcap, a.estimert_mcap, (k.mcap - a.estimert_mcap) / ((k.mcap + a.estimert_mcap) / 2.0) AS overvurdering FROM aksjer a JOIN aksjekurs k ON a.ticker = k.ticker WHERE k.dato = (SELECT MAX(dato) FROM aksjekurs) AND a.estimert_mcap IS NOT NULL AND k.mcap IS NOT NULL AND k.mcap > 100000000 AND a.estimert_mcap > 0 AND NOT a.estimert_mcap is NULL ORDER BY overvurdering DESC

SELECT a.navn, a.ticker, 1 AS andel, k.mcap, a.estimert_mcap, (k.mcap - a.estimert_mcap) / ((k.mcap + a.estimert_mcap) / 2.0) AS overvurdering FROM aksjer a JOIN aksjekurs k ON a.ticker = k.ticker WHERE k.dato = (SELECT MAX(dato) FROM aksjekurs) AND a.estimert_mcap IS NOT NULL AND k.mcap IS NOT NULL AND k.mcap > 100000000 AND a.estimert_mcap > 0 AND NOT a.estimert_mcap is NULL ORDER BY overvurdering ASC
